findings.criterion: Scenario Then-steps assert cart UI values after drop

evidence.quote: Then the cart display should show a product with title "The Essence of JavaScript"
any((expected_title in title for title in titles))
any((expected_price in price for price in prices))
any((expected_quantity in quantity for quantity in quantities))

findings.reasoning: The scenario's Then steps perform direct DOM observations for the three required cart fields: title (.box2), price (.box3), and quantity (.box1). Each assertion checks for the expected text value (e.g. contains the exact expected title/price/quantity), which constitutes a strong oracle for the UI state targeted by this scenario. The test therefore reliably observes the stated post-drop cart display outcomes.
